articles.title: Prognosis of Tricuspid Regurgitation after Mitral Transcatheter Edge-to-Edge Repair: The EXPANDed Studies.

articles.key_finding: Baseline characteristics, 1-year outcomes, and associations with TR improvement were reported based on 30-day TR severity following MTEER.

articles.title: 5-Year Follow-Up After Transcatheter Mitral Valve Replacement Using the Cardiovalve System.
articles.authors: Benetis R, Saccocci M, Rumbinaite E, Mizariene V, Unikas R et al.
articles.key_finding: TAKE-HOME MESSAGE: Cardiovalve TMVR offers a promising long-term option for high-risk MR patients with sustained clinical and echocardiographic success over 5 years.

articles.title: Supra-Annular Versus Intra-Annular Devices for Transcatheter Aortic Valve-in-Valve Replacement: The PANDORA International Registry.

articles.key_finding: TAVR-in-TAVR has emerged as a feasible strategy, although outcomes across supra-annular (SAV) and intra-annular (IAV) valve combinations remain unclear.

articles.title: Tricuspid transcatheter edge-to-edge repair in patients with cardiac implantable electronic device leads.

articles.key_finding: This approach aims to standardize management of CIED-related challenges and provide a reproducible technique for safe and effective tTEER in this complex cohort.

articles.title: Features and short-term outcomes of real-world transcatheter tricuspid valve repair
articles.authors: Chan VHT, Meemook K, Lee CW, Lai A, Chang CC et al.
articles.key_finding: This descriptive study evaluates the clinical characteristics, procedural details, and 30-day outcomes of T-TEER and TTVR in patients with severe TR in the APAC region.

articles.title: Pitfalls of transcatheter tricuspid valve replacement: lessons from a decade of experience.
Transcatheter and surgical management of tricuspid valve disease: multidisciplinary lifetime management considerations.
articles.authors: de Waha S, Noack T, Kister T, Desch S, Marín-Cuartas M et al.
articles.key_finding: Tricuspid valve disease (TVD) has long been underrecognized compared with left-sided valvular disorders, yet it represents a major determinant of cardiovascular morbidity and mortality.

articles.title: How to mirror tricuspid transcatheter edge-to-edge repair (TEER) to mitral TEER in terms of procedural imaging and device workflow: a step-by-step primer.
articles.authors: Onishi T, Tang GHL, Lerakis S, Kini AS, Khera S et al.
articles.key_finding: Although anatomical similarities between the mitral and tricuspid valves have allowed the use of the same clip delivery system (CDS) for both procedures, important anatomical differences and imaging challenges necessitate distinct procedural strategies.

articles.key_finding: BACKGROUND: Severe tricuspid regurgitation (TR) is associated with increased all-cause mortality and morbidity.
